prompt: The project has a circular dependency issue between services/UserService.swift and services/AuthService.swift. They import each other. Refactor to break the cycle using a protocol-based approach. This is a structural refactoring that touches architecture.

assertions.name: classifies_as_complex
assertions.description: Correctly identifies task as Complex complexity

assertions.name: creates_detailed_plan
assertions.description: Creates execution plan with architecture analysis

assertions.name: delegates_with_opus
assertions.description: Uses opus model for deep reasoning task

assertions.name: pre_validates_imports
assertions.description: Runs lint-deps before adding cross-module imports

assertions.name: full_pipeline_validation
assertions.description: Runs full validation pipeline including lint-deps

assertions.name: cross_review_with_different_model
assertions.description: Cross-reviews with different model than coding agent

assertions.name: trajectory_check
assertions.description: Checks if pattern qualifies for trajectory compilation
